chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No. 559 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For orders on CMA No. 2640/2019 (Stay) 22.01.2026 Mr. Aamir Raza, advocate for applicant. Per learned counsel, the impugned judgment is rested on adjudication of factual controversy by the last fact-finding forum in the statutory hierarchy and no question of law arises therefrom. In view hereof, this reference is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
